name: lawmem
description: Persistent semantic memory-as-a-service for legal AI agents. Store and recall case notes, client context, and matter history via MCP.
author: Pablo Davidov

tools.name: store_memory
tools.description: Store a legal text memory for later semantic recall. The text is embedded and stored in a vector database. Returns the memory ID, token count, and a preview of the stored text. Use matter_id to scope memories to a specific case or client matter.

tools.name: recall_memories
tools.description: Semantically search stored legal memories using natural language. Returns the most relevant results ranked by cosine similarity. Optionally filter by matter_id to restrict results to a specific case.

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Permanently delete a stored memory by its UUID. Hard delete for GDPR right-to-erasure compliance. Removes from both vector store and database. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get usage statistics for your tenant: total memory count, today's API call counts (store/recall/read), all-time totals, and your wallet balance.
